---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an API addition or improvement that fits SignalPlot’s scope
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to do with Matplotlib that SignalPlot does not support well today?

## Proposed change

Describe the API or behavior you have in mind. Small, composable helpers are a better fit than new abstraction layers.

## Alternatives

What workarounds exist with plain Matplotlib plus current SignalPlot?

## Style contract

Does the idea stay compatible with the minimalist style rules in the README (palette, spines, honest scales, etc.)?
